product_overview: Portfolio-Fixer is a portfolio CMS that lets visitors browse a public professional portfolio and contact the owner, while giving the owner a private admin area to manage showcased content. The app focuses on presenting projects, skills, experience, certifications, and contact information in a polished, editable format.
core_goals: Browse the public portfolio and learn about the owner’s skills, projects, experience, and certifications
Open detailed project pages to review project context and outcomes
Send a contact message from the public site
Log in to the admin area to manage portfolio content

features.name: View Portfolio
features.description: Browse the public portfolio sections and inspect showcased content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through the portfolio sections -> View the hero, about, skills, projects, experience, certifications, and contact content
Navigate to / -> Scroll through the projects section -> Select a project -> View the detailed project page
Navigate to /projects/:slug -> View the project’s description, tech stack, metrics, and related projects -> Return to the portfolio

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Submit a message to the portfolio owner from the public site.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the contact section -> Fill in name, email, and message -> Submit the form -> See a success message
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the contact section -> Enter invalid form input -> Submit the form -> See inline validation feedback

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Access the private admin dashboard using email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the admin dashboard
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill in invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an error message

features.name: View Portfolio
features.description: Browse portfolio sections including Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Experience, and Certifications

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Send a message via contact form

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Login to admin dashboard with email and password
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
